name: AdventHealth 400
comments: Denny Hamlin won the 4th running of the AdventHealth 400 at Kansas Speedway, his 49th victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following cars dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reasons indicated: 7, 47, 78 (unapproved adjustments).
